scripts.build: bun run build:terminal && bun build ./src/index.html --outdir=dist --sourcemap --target=browser --minify && bun build ./src/wasm-scene-worker.ts --outfile=dist/wasm-scene-worker.js --target=browser --format=esm --minify && bun run src/build-pages.ts
scripts.build:dev: bun run build:terminal:dev && bun build ./src/index.html --outdir=dist --sourcemap --target=browser && bun build ./src/wasm-scene-worker.ts --outfile=dist/wasm-scene-worker.js --target=browser --format=esm && bun run src/build-pages.ts
scripts.test:browser: playwright install chromium && bun run build && bun test ./src/browser-integration.browser.ts --timeout 120000 && bun test ./src/frame-cadence.browser.ts --timeout 120000 && bun test ./src/raster-damage.browser.ts --timeout 120000
